criteria.name: Definition of Containerisation
criteria.description: Accurately defines containerisation and distinguishes it from virtual machines.

criteria.name: Benefits of Containerisation
criteria.description: Identifies and explains at least four key benefits with sufficient detail.

criteria.name: Role of Kubernetes
criteria.description: Explains Kubernetes purpose and its relevance to modern DevOps practices.

criteria.name: Technical Accuracy and Depth
criteria.description: Demonstrates technical accuracy and appropriate depth throughout the response.
